rows.label: qev070304_MSG0001
rows.name:
Well done!
Honestly... if you hadn't come,
I might have been killed by tomorrow.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070304_MSG0002
rows.name:
That guy Gud...
He seems to hold quite a grudge against me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070304_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask why he was captured here.

rows.label: qev070304_SEL0021
rows.name: Propose escaping quickly before the enemy spots you.

rows.label: qev070304_MSG0003
rows.name:
Hmm, starting with an accurate assessment of information.
Professional work as always.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070304_MSG0004
rows.name:
You remember that kidnapper named Gud
who attacked you and me before, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070304_MSG0005
rows.name:
I was attacked by them while gathering materials.
Well, if it had just been the usual gang,
there's no way I would have been captured.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070304_MSG0006
rows.name:
The bodyguard he hired... he was troublesome.
He caught me off guard and knocked me unconscious.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070304_MSG0007
rows.name:
You be careful of him too.
Even if I was off guard, he's an expert
who knocked this Doctor B unconscious with a single blow.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070304_MSG0008
rows.name:
Hmm, swift action is the only way... huh.
Professional work as always.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070304_MSG0009
rows.name:
However, you must be careful of the bodyguard
Gud hired... Watch out for him alone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070304_MSG0010
rows.name:
Even if I was off guard, he is an expert
who knocked this Doctor B
unconscious with a single blow.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070304_MSG0011
rows.name:
It's best to stay vigilant.
I'll head to the Mirarian first,
so you come quickly too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070304_MSG0012
rows.name:
Is this also what they call personal magnetism?
That Graham guy is crying tears of joy
over reuniting with me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070304_MSG0013
rows.name:
Uwaaah... Uuuuh!
Doctor B! I can't take this kind of anxiety anymore,
so please repay the full amount early...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070304_MSG0014
rows.name:
Hahaha! You helpless fool.
If you want to see my face that badly,
I'll work you to the bone at my Factory 1.21.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070304_MSG0015
rows.name:
Hmm... I was just short on hands anyway,
so this might be a brilliant idea.[ST:wait ]
